home.call-to-action: Find your perfect stay in Manresa
home.welcome-message: Located in the heart of Catalonia, our apartments offer an ideal situation to engage in all kinds of activities. From exploring the city itself to taking excursions to unique must-visit places in Catalonia.
home.rooms-description: Our apartments provide excellent services and extraordinary conditions.

about-us.main-paragraph: At {{COMPANY_NAME}}, we take pride in offering a unique and personalized lodging experience in the charming city of Manresa. With a decade-long track record in the vacation rental industry, we have kept our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction at the forefront of everything we do.
about-us.out-team-paragraph: At the heart of {{COMPANY_NAME}} lies our dedicated and passionate team. Comprised of professionals with a decade of experience in the tourism and hospitality industry, we are here to ensure that your stay in Manresa is unforgettable. From customer service to property management, every member of our team is dedicated to your comfort and satisfaction. We strive to provide personalized and attentive service, ensuring that every detail of your experience is flawless.
about-us.out-mission-paragraph: At {{COMPANY_NAME}}, our mission is simple: to make your vacations in Manresa extraordinary. We are committed to providing you with quality accommodations, memorable experiences, and exceptional service every step of the way. From the moment you book until the day you depart, we are here to ensure you enjoy a comfortable, convenient, and worry-free stay. We believe that every trip is an opportunity to create lasting memories, and we are proud to be part of your adventure in Manresa.

privacy-policy.privacy-policy-p: At {{COMPANY_NAME}}, we value the privacy of our visitors and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services. Please read this Privacy Policy carefully to understand our practices regarding your personal data and how we will treat it.
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-p: We may collect certain personally identifiable information that you voluntarily provide to us when you:
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-li1: Fill out forms on our website
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-li3: Contact us through email or other communication channels
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-li4: The personally identifiable information we may collect includes, but is not limited to:
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-li5: Your name, email address, and other contact information
privacy-policy.information-we-collect-li6: Information about your usage of our website, such as pages visited and interactions made
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-p: We may use the information we collect from you for various purposes, including:
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-li1: To provide and maintain our services, including customer support and communications
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-li2: To personalize your experience and deliver relevant content and offers
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-li3: To improve our website, services, and overall user experience
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-li4: To send periodic emails or newsletters
privacy-policy.how-we-use-your-information-li5: To respond to your inquiries, requests, or feedback
privacy-policy.information-sharing-and-disclosure-p1: We may share your personal information with third-party service providers, business partners, or other trusted entities who assist us in operating our website or providing our services. However, we will only share your information to the extent necessary and with appropriate safeguards in place to protect your privacy.
privacy-policy.information-sharing-and-disclosure-p2: We may also disclose your personal information if required by law or when we believe that such disclosure is necessary to:
privacy-policy.information-sharing-and-disclosure-li4: Ensure the safety of our users
privacy-policy.security-p: We take the security of your personal information seriously and employ industry-standard measures to protect it from unauthorized access, disclosure, or alteration. However, please be aware that no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy-policy.your-choices-p: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information that we have collected. If you would like to exercise these rights or have any questions or concerns about our Privacy Policy, please contact us using the information provided below.
privacy-policy.contact-us-p: If you have any questions or concerns regarding our Privacy Policy or our practices, please contact us at:

cookie.consent: This website uses its own cookies to collect information with the aim of improving our services. You can accept all cookies by clicking the 'Accept' button or configure or reject their use by clicking on 'Cookie Settings'. The user has the option to configure their browser to prevent cookies from being installed on their device, although they should be aware that this action may cause difficulties in navigating the website.
